name: LedgerCore / LedgerBrain — x402 pay-per-use KYA, KYT, and KYE compliance API for AI agents
description: Run crypto address risk reports, transaction risk screening, entity due diligence, compliance risk screening, and auditable compliance reports via x402 payments. No LedgerBrain API key required for x402 endpoints.
notice: This file is a static reference mirror for agents and indexers. The live canonical discovery document is https://api.ledgercore.io/.well-known/x402 — always fetch from the live URL for current endpoint and pricing data.
instructions: Discover payable resources at catalogUrl. POST any paid endpoint without a payment header to receive a 402 challenge (PAYMENT-REQUIRED header with payTo address, price, network, and token). Pay with USDC on Base mainnet, then retry with the PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header. No LedgerBrain API key required for x402 endpoints.
tags: no LedgerBrain API key required for x402 endpoints
